subject: Research OpenCode skill specification
description:
Use Context7 MCP tools and web search to fetch and analyze the OpenCode skill specification documentation.

Gather:
- Required file format and structure (frontmatter fields, section layout)
- Required vs optional fields
- Naming conventions and idioms
- Example skill files
- Version information for the spec

Store findings in a structured format that can be referenced when writing the embedded OpenCode platform knowledge section.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] OpenCode skill format fully documented (frontmatter, sections, structure)
- [ ] Required fields identified and listed
- [ ] Optional fields identified with descriptions
- [ ] At least 2 example skills analyzed for patterns
- [ ] Spec version captured

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Handle case where Context7 docs are incomplete — supplement with web search
- [ ] Handle case where multiple spec versions exist — use latest

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] If Context7 is unavailable, fall back to web search
- [ ] Document any gaps or uncertainties in findings

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify all required fields are captured by cross-referencing official docs
• Manual: Confirm example skills match documented format

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Section 9.1
